data.title: ARB price may reach $0.13 amid squeeze at $0.12 - whales accumulating, retail uncertain. Predicted deeper correction.
data.description: The predicted price for ARB is a dead cat bounce to $0.13 before a further correction. Currently, ARB is at a standstill at $0.12, caught in a classic squeeze situation where large investors are gathering holdings while smaller retail investors are hesitant. A rapid increase to $0.13 resistance level is anticipated before a potential deeper correction.

There is a 65% likelihood of the stock initially revisiting the $0.91 support before a significant upward surge.

data.title: XLM may surge by 75% to $0.30, currently at $0.16. A breakdown to $0.12 is possible, technical indicators show.

data.title: PACCAR Increases Regular Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, PACCAR Inc's Board of Directors has announced a rise in the regular quarterly cash dividend from $0.33 per share to $0.35 per share. The increased dividend will be disbursed on June 3, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 13, 2026. Mark Pigott, the executive chairman, expressed that PACCAR has consistently provided strong shareholder returns and profitability over many years, including yearly dividends.

data.title: Red Hat engineer Sally O'Malley launches Tank OS, safeguarding AI agents with isolated containers to prevent interference. Prevents access to host machine and credentials.
data.description: Sally O'Malley, a principal engineer at Red Hat and the maintainer of OpenClaw, has introduced Tank OS. This new tool is designed to confine AI agents within separate containers to prevent them from disrupting each other or the host system. Tank OS ensures that credentials are securely stored within the containers.

data.title: TRX may hit $0.35, then drop to $0.28 in 2 weeks as TRON sits at key $0.32 support.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TRON is currently at a critical support level of $0.32, as its momentum has slowed down. It is anticipated to experience a slight increase to the $0.35 resistance before potentially dropping to $0.28 within the next two weeks.

data.title: Sunrun Prices $584 million Securitization of Residential Solar and Storage Assets
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in San Francisco, Sunrun, listed on Nasdaq as RUN, disclosed the pricing of a securitization deal involving leases and power purchase agreements. Sunrun, the biggest supplier in the U.S. of home battery storage, solar, and home-to-grid power plants, stated that this marks their sixteenth securitization since 2015 and the initial issuance for the year 2026.

data.title: Predicting MATIC's price to reach $0.45, with potential 18% increase from oversold level of $0.38, supported by RSI at 38 and stagnant momentum. Technical consolidation signals nearing completion.
data.description: With MATIC trading at $0.38, its Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 38 and momentum is flatlining. This oversold position indicates a potential 18% upside to $0.45 as technical consolidation approaches completion.

data.title: DOGE may rally to $0.16 or test support at $0.10 soon, indicating a potential breakout in two weeks. (Read More)

data.title: Solana's price at critical $80 support may lead to a $150 breakout; pivotal moment as altcoin deciphers broader crypto market.

The direction Solana takes next will be crucial in determining if it will be part of the wider crypto market's recovery or if it will experience further decline.

data.title: Core Scientific (CORZ) to build 1.5GW AI Data Center in Texas, repurposing Bitcoin mining setup to meet high demand for HPC.
data.description: Core Scientific has redirected its attention towards Artificial Intelligence by establishing a massive 1.5 gigawatt data center in Texas. This initiative involves repurposing Bitcoin mining infrastructure to cater to the increasing need for High Performance Computing (HPC).

data.title: XRP forecast: $2.80 possible rally, $1.36 support crucial. Faces resistance at $1.82, ETF optimism could drive recovery.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is currently experiencing a crucial technical situation as it struggles to surpass the $1.82 resistance mark, potentially leading to a decline towards the $1.36 support level. Despite this, there is growing optimism surrounding the possibility of an Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) for XRP, which could trigger a price rebound up to $2.80 if certain essential thresholds are maintained. Investors are closely monitoring these levels to gauge the future direction of XRP.

data.title: Bitcoin's price could hit $85K by June despite technical challenges, aiming to break $76K barrier. Bullish sentiment persists.
data.description: The lack of movement in Bitcoin's price at $76,000 highlights the market's conflict between optimistic and pessimistic narratives. Technical analysis suggests that the price may face resistance at $85,000 before the summer months.

data.title: Madison Air Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Madison Air Solutions Corporation (NYSE: MAIR) revealed plans to hold a conference call and webcast regarding its performance in the first quarter of 2026. Madison Air is a leading provider of air quality solutions for commercial and residential sectors. This event aims to shed light on the company's financial results and strategies. Investors and interested individuals can join the discussion to gain insights into Madison Air's progress during this period.
